title: Weekly Product Sync - July 8, 2027
body:
Weekly Product Sync
July 8, 2027

Summary: Reviewed Q3 roadmap, discussed user research schedule and product requirements.

Action Items:
- Alice: draft PRD outline
- Bob: schedule user interviews
- Charlie: follow up with

Notes:
- Need to finalize PRD by July 15.
- User interviews should target 10 participants.
- Dana will share competitive analysis by end of week.

title: Sprint Retrospective - July 6, 2027
body:
Retrospective for Sprint 12.

What went well:
- Story point velocity improved by 12%.
- CI/CD pipeline now fully automated.

What to improve:
- Test coverage needs 5% bump.

Action items:
- Eve: add unit tests for payment module.

title: Design Review - July 7, 2027
body:
Reviewed new onboarding flow designs.

Feedback:
- Too many steps in sign-up, consider reducing to three screens.
- Color contrast issues flagged.

Action items:
- Dana: update onboarding mocks by July 14.
- Charlie: user research plan for onboarding test.
